About Quentin:

He is very closed off sweetheart that only opens once in a while, but in the most aggressive way, he punches, yells or just sobs. He has diagnosed anger issues and BPD, so yeah, kinda hard guy to handle in relationships. He loves junk food, smoking weed or cigs and overall being alone.

His electric guitar is: DIMAVERY ST-203 E-Guitar (the gothic black edition) :F.

He is a virgin, but he has bunch of kinks and he would be 100% be switch. He's into puppy play, orgasm denial, BDSM, foreplays (blowjobs, gently makeouts and stuff like that). He would love to try anal too (or pegging ykykyk).

Damn, I don't want to just assign his kinks, I want people to assign something about him too TwT. Also I am sorry if my english is bad, it is not my first language.
